title: CroakLib
description: Library mod for my common code.
body:
![](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fbba1451-b761-4ded-beb6-946891a4df9e) [![Support me on Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/croakandroll---?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white&label=Support%20me%20on%20Ko-Fi&labelColor=72a4f2&color=72a4f2)](https://ko-fi.com/croakandroll) [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/meeplabsdev/croaklib?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=black&label=Latest%20Release&labelColor=72f2ae&color=72f2ae)](https://github.com/meeplabsdev/croaklib/releases/latest)


# What is it?
This is simply a library for my other mods, providing common functionality and keeping mods easier to maintain.

_Note: I had an older mod also by the name of CroakLib, which is no longer available (see [here](https://ko-fi.com/i/IW7W71GXMXX) for that), so if you somehow ended up here, you can try the [old page](https://modrinth.com/project/croaklib-dep) but you probably won't have much luck._
